table_summary: Валютын арилжааны хэлцлийн дэлгэрэнгүй мэдээллийг агуулсан харагдац. Спот, форвард, своп зэрэг бүх төрлийн валютын хэлцлүүдийг хамарна. Swap хэлцлүүд (IS_SWAP=1) олон мөртэй байж болох бөгөөд LEG_NUMBER-ээр ялгагдана (1=near leg, 2=far leg). (A comprehensive view of FX trading deals executed by the bank. Includes SPOT, FORWARD, and SWAP transactions. Each row represents one deal or one leg of a deal. Use this to understand deal definitions and properties.)

column_descriptions.deal_code: Хэлцлийн дугаар (Deal Code). The unique identifier for the FX deal. **Primary key for joining FX data.** Sample values: 'SWSP20082800001', 'SPOT20082800023', 'SWFR20082800002'.
column_descriptions.is_swap: Swap хэлцэл эсэх (Is Swap). Flag indicating if this is a swap transaction. **CRITICAL for filtering.** 0=Not swap, 1=Swap. Only IS_SWAP=1 deals have daily balances in FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL.
column_descriptions.cust_code: Харилцагчийн дугаар (Customer Code). The unique identifier for the counterparty.
column_descriptions.acnt_code: Дансны дугаар (Account Code). The account code associated with this deal.
column_descriptions.customer_name: Харилцагчийн нэр (Customer Name). The name of the counterparty. Sample values: 'FCC SECURITIES B.V.', 'МОНГОЛ БАНК', 'ХААН БАНК'.
column_descriptions.prod_code: Бүтээгдэхүүний код (Product Code). The product code. Sample values: '61050301', '61050210', '61050209'.
column_descriptions.prod_name: Бүтээгдэхүүний нэр (Product Name). The product name. Sample values: 'СПОТ АРИЛЖАА', 'СВОП АРИЛЖАА-БОДИТ /1 ЖИЛ ДЭЭШ ХУГАЦААТАЙ/', 'ФОРВАРД АРИЛЖАА-БОДИТ БУС /3 САР - 1 ЖИЛ ХҮРТЭЛХ/'.
column_descriptions.control_center_name: Хяналтын төвийн нэр (Control Center Name). Sample values: 'МУХБ - НӨӨЦ УДИРДЛАГА'.
column_descriptions.description: Нэмэлт тайлбар (Description). Additional description of the deal.
column_descriptions.dealer_id: Диллерын код (Dealer ID). The employee ID who executed the deal. Sample values: '10510', '10097'.
column_descriptions.dealer_name: Диллерын нэр (Dealer Name). The name of the dealer. Sample values: 'ДАГМЭДМАА', 'ӨЛЗИЙСАЙХАН'.
column_descriptions.prod_type: Бүтээгдэхүүний төрөл (Product Type). The type of FX product. Sample values: 'SPOT', 'FORWARD'.
column_descriptions.sub_type: Дэд төрөл (Sub Type). The sub-type of the product. Sample values: 'SPOTTODAY', 'SPOTDATOMORROW', 'SPOTTOMORROW'.
column_descriptions.step_id: Алхмын дугаар (Step ID). The current step in the deal workflow. Sample values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6.
column_descriptions.step_name: Алхмын нэр (Step Name). The name of the current step. Sample values: 'ХЭЛЦЛИЙН БҮРТГЭЛ', 'ЭХЛҮҮЛЭХ', 'ХЭЛЦЛИЙН БАТАЛГАА', 'ТӨЛБӨРИЙН ДААЛГАВАР', 'ТӨЛБӨР', 'ХЭЛЦЛИЙН ХААЛТ'.
column_descriptions.trco_id: Оролцогч талын дугаар (Counterparty ID). Identifier for the counterparty in the deal. Sample values: 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 14.
column_descriptions.deal_date: Хэлцэл хийсэн огноо (Deal Date). The date when the deal was executed.
column_descriptions.buy_sell: Арилжааны төрөл (Buy/Sell). The direction of the trade. **S=Зарсан (Sold), B=Худалдаж авсан (Bought).**
column_descriptions.buy_sell_name: Арилжааны төрлийн нэр (Buy/Sell Name). The descriptive name of the trade direction.
column_descriptions.deal_status: Хэлцлийн төлөв (Deal Status). **CRITICAL for filtering.** C=Хаагдсан (Closed), D=Цуцалсан (Cancelled), SF=Төлөлт дууссан (Settlement Finished), SS=Төлөлт эхэлсэн (Settlement Started), S=Эхэлсэн (Started), N=Шинэ (New).
column_descriptions.buy_amount: Худалдаж авсан дүн (Buy Amount). The amount being purchased in buy_cur_code currency.
column_descriptions.buy_cur_code: Худалдаж авсан валют (Buy Currency). The currency being purchased.
column_descriptions.buy_rate: Худалдаж авах валютын ханш (Buy Rate). The exchange rate for the buy currency.
column_descriptions.sell_amount: Зарсан дүн (Sell Amount). The amount being sold in sell_cur_code currency.
column_descriptions.sell_cur_code: Зарах валют (Sell Currency). The currency being sold.
column_descriptions.sell_rate: Зарах валютын ханш (Sell Rate). The exchange rate for the sell currency.
column_descriptions.deal_rate: Хэлцлийн ханш (Deal Rate). The deal exchange rate (buy_rate / sell_rate).
column_descriptions.buy_date: Худалдаж авах талын валютлах огноо (Buy Value Date). The settlement date for the buy side.
column_descriptions.sell_date: Зарах талын валютлах огноо (Sell Value Date). The settlement date for the sell side.
column_descriptions.profit_loss: Ашиг, алдагдал (Profit/Loss). Calculated from difference between deal_rate and market_rate.
column_descriptions.market_rate: Зах зээлийн ханш (Market Rate). The current market exchange rate.
column_descriptions.margin: Маржин (Margin). The profit added on top of the base rate.
column_descriptions.swap_give_int: Swap өгөх хүү (Swap Give Interest). Interest to be paid on swap.
column_descriptions.swap_take_int: Swap авах хүү (Swap Take Interest). Interest to be received on swap.
column_descriptions.comb_code_name: Комбинацын нэр (Combination Name). Sample values: 'СПОТ-ФОРВАРД ХОСЛОЛ /3САР ХҮРТЭЛХ-БОДИТ/', 'СПОТ-ФОРВАРД ХОСЛОЛ /1ЖИЛ ДЭЭШ-БОДИТ/'.
column_descriptions.profitable_side: Ашиг буух тал (Profitable Side). Which side gains. Sample values: 'B', 'S', 'N'.
column_descriptions.pair1: Валютын хос 1 (Currency Pair 1). First currency in the pair.
column_descriptions.pair2: Валютын хос 2 (Currency Pair 2). Second currency in the pair.
column_descriptions.swap_code: Swap хэлцлийн дугаар (Swap Code). If this is a swap deal, the swap identifier. NULL for non-swap deals. Sample values: 'SWAP20082800001'.
column_descriptions.last_reval_date1: Сүүлд үнэлгээ хийсэн огноо (Last Revaluation Date). The date of last revaluation.
column_descriptions.leg_number: Хөлийн дугаар (Leg Number). **For swap deals: 1=near leg, 2=far leg.** NULL for non-swap deals.
column_descriptions.swap_acnt_code: Swap дансны дугаар (Swap Account Code). Account code for the swap. Sample values: '3600007179'.
